articles.title: WHY PRODUCT TEAMS STILL AREN'T SHIPPING FAST ENOUGH
articles.summary: You've heard "done is better than perfect". You're pressured to condense cycles to weeks. But when it's time to launch, you still keep iterating for perfection.

articles.title: THE BEST PRODUCT WORK YOU'LL DO MIGHT NEVER BE ON THE ROADMAP
articles.summary: Quiet pilots let product managers quickly test ideas with less risk and clearer direction. To stay strategic, they should focus on outcomes, share insights tied to business goals, and plan clear exits to avoid lingering in unofficial work.

articles.title: SHOULD WE ROOT FOR AI?
articles.summary: Rapid AI adoption can reveal a professional's replaceability as tools automate strategic tasks. To stay essential, they must use AI to elevate judgment, empathy, and creativity - not replace them.

articles.title: HOW SMART PMS SCALE THEIR CAREERS IN ANY ORG
articles.summary: Successful product managers shift from control to influence as they move from startups to enterprises, using visibility and strategic storytelling to drive impact. Adaptability is their core strength.

articles.title: SOMETIMES HARD UI CAN BE A BLESSING
articles.summary: Intentionally complex interfaces can improve user outcomes by adding cognitive friction, particularly when users are highly motivated. This approach is most effective in certain B2C scenarios, but skilled B2B users may also benefit from targeted complexity.

articles.title: MAKING AI FEEL LIKE A HUMAN PARTNER: 5 BEHAVIORAL PRINCIPLES
articles.summary: Effective AI integration depends on thoughtful UX: involve users as collaborators, personalize early interactions, and make AI processes transparent. The best products reveal AI features gradually, use social proof, and apply labor illusions to build trust and human connection.

articles.title: BUILD A STUNNING PERSONAL WEBSITE WITH AI IN 15 MINUTES
articles.summary: You can build a great-looking personal website using Bolt and a detailed AI prompt - no coding needed. Just customize the design, add content and motion, then deploy with one click.

articles.title: HOW TO FIGHT BACK AGAINST AI TOURISTS
articles.summary: SaaS businesses face increasing churn, especially with AI-related customers, making revenue harder to predict. This guide offers 14 smart tactics to drive adoption - like default pricing, exclusive perks, and usage-based nudges.

articles.title: AI AND THE FUTURE OF PRODUCT TEAMS (7 MINUTE VIDEO)
articles.summary: AI's impact on the workplace is often underestimated, especially for product teams. As roles evolve, success will depend less on using AI tools and more on developing clear thinking, imagination, and critical judgment.

articles.title: PROMPTING IS MANAGEMENT IN DISGUISE
articles.summary: Effective prompting mirrors skilled management - clearly setting direction, defining priorities, and guiding AI behavior.

articles.title: EXAMPLE OF A KPI TREE
articles.summary: A clear KPI tree outlines the overall goal, its components, the measurable metrics, and the ideas to drive those metrics.
